Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Andrew Zacks; Zacks, Freedman & Patterson, P.C.; 415-956-8100; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff 2400 Pacific Avenue, LLC.

Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR# 10619, 925-384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com

Plaintiff contests the tentative ruling. Plaintiff's counsel argues that while the January 29, 2021 amendment to the Covid-19 Tenant Relief Act [CTRA] imposed a new stay on breach of contract actions in any court until July 1, 2021, it specificially exempted from the stay any action filed before October 1, 2020. Plaintiff's counsel states that because this action was filed on September 15, 2020, it is therefore exempt from the stay imposed by the CTRA.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments, the court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Demurrer To Complaint is taken under submission. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR# 10619, 925-384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Continued To Apr-07-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Continued To Mar-02-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC's Motion For Reconsideration Of Demurrer To Complaint is continued to March 2, 2021 for Defendant to address the new argument raised in the reply re: January 29, 2021 amendment to Covid Tenant Relief Act. (Reply 2:1-8). Defendant's brief, if any, shall be filed and served no later than February 23, 2021. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Mark Chernev, Esq. 415-956-8100 of Zacks Freedman Patterson for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.
Court Reporter: Jaimie Hopp, CSR#13751, 925-759-0770, jaimiehopp@gmail.com, Reported.

The Court reads the Tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Counsel argues he has not seen the announcement re: recovery in small claims court and requests leave to amend instead of sustaining demurrer. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT'S Demurrer To Complaint.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Jaimie Hopp, CSR#13751, 925-759-0770, jaimiehopp@gmail.com, Reported. =(501/REQ)
